description: Create a 'Monthly Summary' sheet in the /home/ga/Documents/central_park_weather_2023.xlsx workbook that aggregates daily weather data from the 'Daily Data' sheet into monthly and annual statistics. The 'Monthly Summary' sheet should feature a statistics table starting at cell A1 with headers for 'Month', 'Avg High (°F)', 'Avg Low (°F)', 'Total Precip (in)', 'Max Temp (°F)', 'Min Temp (°F)', and 'Precip Days' for each month of 2023. Additionally, include an 'Annual Summary' section starting at row 16 that calculates the 'Annual Avg High', 'Annual Avg Low', 'Total Annual Precip', and 'Total Precip Days'. Apply number formatting of 1 decimal place for all temperature values and 2 decimal places for all precipitation values. Save the updated workbook to its original location.
